description: {"blocks":[{"key":"32j8o","text":"This is Appendix C of \"Phase 3 randomized, double-blinded, placebo-controlled trial to evaluate the safety, immunogenicity, and efficacy of Vaccine Candidate against COVID-19 in adults \u003e 18 years of age\"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":140,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fg83k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"59eu8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mq46","text":"This generic Phase 3 protocol was developed by the PATH team with support of the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation. The aim of the collection is to share recommended best practices in designing and implementing a Phase 3 study of a COVID-19 vaccine candidate. As Phase 3 trials of different Vaccine Candidates  proceed around the world, following the same protocols will ensure consistency and comparability of the Phase 3 trial results.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5cuih","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"93ede","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4sa5m","text":"Please note that this is an evolving document, to be versioned and updated, based on community feedback and new data.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

We are asking you to be in a research study.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"blnic","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d6rvl","text":"A research study is a way to learn new things. It is not the same as treatment or medical care. This is a study about an experimental vaccine for COVID-19 called NAME OF VACCINE. From now on, we will call it the “study vaccine.” We are asking you to be in the study because you are healthy and you live or work in an area that has high rates of COVID-19 infection. We plan to select about XX people to be in the study. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":162,"length":15},{"style":"bold","offset":389,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fpeqv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bqk7","text":"This form explains what will happen in this study. We will tell you the risks and benefits of being in the study. Take your time to decide if joining the study is right for you. If it helps, talk to people you trust. Ask questions about anything that is not clear. If you decide to join, you will sign this form. We will give you a copy to keep.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"73lvj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"76uvf","text":"Researchers from SPONSOR and \u003cNAME OF RESEARCH PARTNERS/SITE\u003e are conducting this study. [NAME] is providing funding for the study. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":17,"length":8},{"style":"bold","offset":29,"length":32},{"style":"bold","offset":89,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4g1l0","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eafl5","text":"2. Here is a summary of the study:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":34}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"74qai","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3orl","text":"We are testing a vaccine for COVID-19 in this study. We are comparing this study vaccine to [ANOTHER VACCINE or PLACEBO]. You will have an equal chance of getting the study vaccine or the comparator vaccine/placebo. If a placebo is used: A placebo is a substance that looks like the vaccine, but does not have the vaccine in it.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":91,"length":29},{"style":"bold","offset":188,"length":27},{"style":"bold","offset":238,"length":90},{"style":"italic","offset":216,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a5del","text":"You do not have to be in the study. You can say “yes” or “no” or leave after joining. If you say “no” or drop out, we will treat you the same. If in health care setting: Any care you or your family receive here will not change. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":143,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"27hqu","text":"If you join, you will be in the study for one year. You will have seven planned visits to the study clinic. We may ask you to come for more visits, if needed. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cpecp","text":"The study involves these procedures: ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5qdrf","text":"            •  Answering questions about yourself and your health.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eb91t","text":"            •  Physical exams.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9hf8k","text":"            •  Nasal swabbing for COVID-19 testing.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3mtdm","text":"            •  Blood draws.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9k0mi","text":"            •  Getting two injections in your upper arm of either the study vaccine or comparator vaccine/placebo, about two                 ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":87,"length":26}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2at4e","text":"                weeks apart. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"38ls7","text":"            •  For some participants: recording if you have any side effects.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"30cmp","text":"            •  Phone calls or electronic messaging.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ki3v","text":"            •  If you become infected with COVID-19: doing testing and medical procedures that help manage your health.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cok6q","text":" All vaccines may have side effects. You may have headache, nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain, diarrhea, fever, chills, tiredness, and muscle and joint aches. You may have pain, redness, itchiness, and swelling where you got the injection. There can be very rare but serious risks, too. We will tell you more about these. The COVID-19 vaccine in this study has been tested in XX people before. These earlier studies showed that it is okay to test the study vaccine in many more people, like we will do in this research study.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":375,"length":3}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c6ibt","text":"We do not know if the study vaccine will protect you from COVID-19. The study vaccine may do nothing, it may protect you, or there is a very rare chance it could make COVID-19 disease worse for you or others who take it. (We tell you more about this later.) Also, you may not get the study vaccine. Because of all of these things, you must continue to practice safe distancing, proper handwashing, and mask-wearing throughout the study to protect yourself from COVID-19.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e2ivf","text":"Being in this study may not help you personally, but it might. If we find that the study vaccine protects against COVID-19, then those who got the vaccine are likely to have protection. Those who got the comparator vaccine/placebo will be offered the study vaccine so they, too, can have a chance for protection from COVID-19. We do not know how long the protection will last.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":204,"length":26}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"31iju","text":"There are no costs to you to be in the study. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1i170","text":"If you join this study and receive the study vaccine, you probably will not be able to join other research studies of COVID-19 vaccines.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f9aoc","text":"We are not sure how getting the study vaccine now will affect your body’s reaction to a future, approved vaccine for COVID-19.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4u3f1","text":"\u003cDESCRIBE ANY PAYMENTS TO PARTICIPANTS, e.g., “We will pay you $10 for each study visit” \u003e.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":91},{"style":"italic","offset":38,"length":51}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"arljg","text":"We will keep your study information confidential.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3qfbn","text":"Those who are able to get pregnant must agree to use birth control to be in this study.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ei6gq","text":"We will ask to keep your left-over blood samples for future research. You can say “no” to sample storage and still be in the study. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7drpg","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"60alq","text":"3. What do we want to learn in this study?","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":42}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dpld","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"37um1","text":"This study is about a vaccine for COVID-19. COVID-19 is a respiratory infection that has spread around the world. The infection is caused by a virus called SARS-CoV-2. From now on, we will call it “the COVID-19 virus.” People can catch the virus by breathing the air near people who are infected. They may also get the virus by touching something that has the virus on it and then touching their eyes, nose, or mouth. Keeping distance from others, wearing a mask, and frequent hand washing are important ways to prevent infection. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":43}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b1hi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9dbro","text":"COVID-19 infection causes a wide range of health issues. Some people show no symptoms, while others experience serious medical problems and need a ventilator to help them breathe. Many people have died from the virus.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"crqkc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"egi0p","text":"In the end, the best protection against COVID-19 will be an effective vaccine. That is what this research study is about. Everyone’s body has an immune system—special cells that act together to fight viruses and other invaders. The study vaccine is designed to help prepare the immune system to fight the real COVID-19 virus if it enters the body. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2vnd9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6tud6","text":"What is the vaccine in this study? The study vaccine is called [NAME]. It is made by [COMPANY].The study vaccine was tested in XX people in earlier studies with no serious health concerns. Results of earlier studies show that we can test the study vaccine in larger groups of people. The study vaccine does not contain the live COVID-19 virus, so there is no way that you can get COVID-19 infection or give it to others from taking the study vaccine.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35},{"style":"bold","offset":62,"length":7},{"style":"bold","offset":85,"length":9},{"style":"bold","offset":127,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"etsl2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"adboa","text":"We would like to answer these questions in the study: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":54}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3giru","text":"Does the study vaccine prevent infection with the COVID-19 virus?","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3u8g5","text":"Can people take the study vaccine safely and without too much discomfort?","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4h50k","text":"Does study vaccine work well to prepare someone’s immune system to fight a COVID-19 infection?","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8dtja","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"eejhq","text":"4. Will this study help you? ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":29}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e60ml","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dk1i1","text":"Being in this research study may not help you personally, but there is a chance it might. Everyone in the study receives physical exams and follow-up of any health issues that arise during the study. You may find this helpful. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47r2n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7of4o","text":"If we see that the study vaccine is safe and effective, we will offer it to everyone in the study. This will be a benefit to you and others in the study. But it is also possible that the study vaccine may not protect people from COVID-19 infection. It may even cause harm, although we do not think this is likely.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5q6pi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6k3h8","text":"5. Protecting yourself from COVID-19 infection during the study ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":64}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7fn6f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2nrv3","text":"Because we do not know if the study vaccine will protect you or others against the COVID-19 virus and half of participants will not get the study vaccine, you must do these things to continue to protect yourself:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8lo5n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fob18","text":"Keep your distance. Stay at least 2-3 meters (6-9 feet) away from others who are not in your household.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3l0u0","text":"Wear a mask anytime you are near someone who is not in your household. This protects you and others from the COVID-19 virus. We will give you masks while you are in the study. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1bphh","text":"Wash your hands properly. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5udak","text":"            •  Use soap and water. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cqfdh","text":"            •  If you lack soap, use water alone and rub your hands vigorously together; follow it up with hand sanitizer. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3k6jf","text":"            •  You should wash for at least 20 seconds and rub all parts of your hands. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2v151","text":"Use hand sanitizer. If you cannot wash your hands properly or at all, use alcohol-based hand sanitizer (gel or wipes) that has at least 60 percent alcohol. We will give this to you in the study. Wipe or gel your hands frequently when you are out in public and touching things.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"80hr1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2m0fn","text":"6. We will tell you the results of these tests. In some people a vaccine might cause an allergic reaction. This allergic reaction can rarely be very severe and lead to anaphylaxis, a condition where the throat swells and a person cannot breathe. The beginning signs of anaphylaxis can be itching, hives, and a swelling of the throat or mouth. Without treatment, people can die from this serious allergic reaction. We manage this risk by not allowing people in the study who have had allergic reactions to past vaccines. Anaphylaxis tends to happen early after getting a vaccine. This is why we have people stay in the study clinic for at least 30 minutes after vaccination. We are trained to provide the right treatment for any allergic reaction to the study vaccines. A vaccine might make the disease worse if someone is exposed to the germ that causes the disease. This is extremely rare. It has happened in some animal studies of vaccines for other coronaviruses (the COVID-19 virus is a type of coronavirus). It has also happened in humans with a vaccine against a respiratory virus called RSV. Animal studies of this study vaccine did not show any sign of this problem when the animals were given the COVID-19 virus after vaccination. We will keep track of each person in the study who gets a COVID-19 infection after receiving a study vaccine. We will closely monitor what happens with their illness. A group of experts is watching over the safety of the study participants. They could see who is getting the study vaccine and who is not. Because COVID-19 is so widespread, people in both the study vaccine group and the comparator vaccine/placebo group may become infected with COVID-19 as the study goes on. This expert group will compare the severity of illness between the study groups. They can advise that we stop the study if it seems that the study vaccine is causing COVID-19 to be more severe in people who got the study vaccine than those who did not.
